label: Transparent aurora motif source
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only an aurora ribbon motif with green and violet light curtains, midnight blue polar-night depth, and snow white horizon accents, isolated full subject, no text.
Subject: A flowing aurora band with layered translucent ribbons, natural magnetic wave shapes, soft polar glow, and crisp edges suitable for transparent cutout use.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop the ribbon edges or glow forms.
Lighting/mood: luminous polar night, immersive data-system mood, vivid but natural aurora color.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for removal. The background must be uniform with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no people, no buildings, no stars as background field, no text, no watermark, no decorative background.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Aurora" derived from the visible transparent aurora ribbon motif.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from aurora green, ribbon violet, midnight blue, snow white, and flowing polar-light geometry. This light board is the primary reference for coding any future theme.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board.
Required visible sections: Morphous Aurora, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples with Geist and Noto Sans JP guidance.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command, sidebar navigation, immersive data metric cards, charts, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, precise grid, 8px card radius, luminous ribbon accents, polar data dashboard mood.
Constraints: no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple-blue gradient wash, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Aurora".

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode version of the visible Morphous Aurora design-system board. It must feel like the same system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the visible transparent aurora ribbon motif and the visible light-mode board as references. Preserve aurora green and violet palette roles, midnight blue depth, ribbon motion, spacing, Japanese typography, and shadcn/tweakcn component coverage. This dark board is the companion reference for coding any future theme.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board.
Required visible sections: Morphous Aurora, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Visual details: polar-night background, snow-white text, aurora green primary accents, ribbon violet secondary accents, luminous chart details, crisp cards and controls.
Constraints: no neon overload, no unrelated saturated colors, no flat pure-black-only background, no illegible text, no random brand names.
